languages.text:
В кавере получает +10% доджа, +10 WP
Персонажи с Death World получают: +20% доджа, +20 WP

В кавере получает +10% доджа, +10 WP

languages.text: The wearer gains +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} and +10% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} while in {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}. Death world characters gain +20 Willpower and +20% dodge while in cover instead.

traits.locale_text: The wearer gains +10 Willpower and +10% dodge while in cover. Death world characters gain +20 Willpower and +20% dodge while in cover instead.

The wearer gains +10 Willpower and +10% dodge while in cover. Death world characters gain +20 Willpower and +20% dodge while in cover instead.

languages.text: Персонаж получает +10 к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Воле{/g} и +10% к {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклонению{/g} в {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}укрытии{/g}. Персонажи с мира смерти вместо этого получают +20 к Воле и +20% к уклонению в укрытии.

Персонаж получает +10 к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Воле{/g} и +10% к {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклонению{/g} в {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}укрытии{/g}. Персонажи с мира смерти вместо этого получают +20 к Воле и +20% к уклонению в укрытии.

languages.text: Der Träger erhält +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willenskraft{/g} und +10 % {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}Ausweichen{/g}, solange er in {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}Deckung{/g} ist. Todeswelt-Charaktere erhalten stattdessen +20 Willenskraft und +20 % Ausweichen, wenn sie in Deckung sind.

traits.locale_text: Der Träger erhält +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willenskraft{/g} und +10 % {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}Ausweichen{/g}, solange er in {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}Deckung{/g} ist. Todeswelt-Charaktere erhalten stattdessen +20 Willenskraft und +20 % Ausweichen, wenn sie in Deckung sind.

languages.text: El portador obtiene +10 de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Voluntad{/g} y +10 % de {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiva{/g} mientras está {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}a cubierto{/g}. Los personajes de mundo letal obtienen +20 de Voluntad y +20 % de esquiva mientras están a cubierto en su lugar.

Los personajes de mundo letal obtienen +20 de Voluntad y +20 % de esquiva mientras están a cubierto en su lugar.

languages.text: Takan kişi, {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}siperdeyken{/g} +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}İrade{/g} niteliği ve +%10 {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınma{/g} değeri kazanır. Siperdeki bir ölüm dünyası karakteri ise bunun yerine +20 İrade ve %20 kaçınma kazanır.

traits.locale_text: Takan kişi, {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}siperdeyken{/g} +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}İrade{/g} niteliği ve +%10 {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınma{/g} değeri kazanır. Siperdeki bir ölüm dünyası karakteri ise bunun yerine +20 İrade ve %20 kaçınma kazanır.

languages.text: 在{g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}掩体{/g}中时，装备者获得10点{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志{/g}和10%{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}。若装备者出身于死亡世界，则改为获得20点意志和20%闪避。
languages.original_text: The wearer gains +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} and +10% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} while in {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}. Death world characters gain +20 Willpower and +20% dodge while in cover instead.

traits.locale_text: 在{g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}掩体{/g}中时，装备者获得10点{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志{/g}和10%{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}。若装备者出身于死亡世界，则改为获得20点意志和20%闪避。

languages.text: L'utilisateur gagne +10 de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Force mentale{/g} et +10 % d'{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}Esquive{/g} lorsqu'il est {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}à couvert{/g}. Les personnages d'un monde hostile gagnent +20 de Force mentale et +20 % d'Esquive à la place lorsqu'ils sont à couvert.
languages.original_text: The wearer gains +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} and +10% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} while in {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}. Death world characters gain +20 Willpower and +20% dodge while in cover instead.

traits.locale_text: L'utilisateur gagne +10 de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Force mentale{/g} et +10 % d'{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}Esquive{/g} lorsqu'il est {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}à couvert{/g}. Les personnages d'un monde hostile gagnent +20 de Force mentale et +20 % d'Esquive à la place lorsqu'ils sont à couvert.

languages.text: 被弾者の{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志力{/g}が+10、{g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}遮蔽{/g}中に{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}回避率{/g}が+10%上昇する。死の惑星出身のキャラクターは、+20の意志力と+20%の回避率を得る。
